data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the verification timeline.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a verification timeline (pending/verified/rejected/revoked). However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the status of the verification timeline. Without concrete evidence confirming or denying the requirement, the validation is blocked.
gaps: No evidence confirming the verification timeline status (pending/verified/rejected/revoked).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the verification timeline.
